_meta.description: MOFCOM-reported (商务部) annual statistics on Taiwan-source foreign direct investment in mainland China. Sourced from MOFCOM's '對外投資合作國別（地區）指南 中國台灣 (2025年版)', Table 3-9 (大陸吸收台資). Amounts are 'actually utilised Taiwan FDI' (實際使用台資) per MOFCOM's customs-of-entry accounting — meaningfully different from MAC's 'approved' figures because: (1) MAC counts at approval, MOFCOM at actual capital landing; (2) MOFCOM attributes by immediate source country, so Taiwanese capital routed via Cayman/BVI/HK shows up under those jurisdictions, not Taiwan.
_meta.refresh_cadence: Annually when MOFCOM publishes the next country guide edition (typically Q1/Q2 of the following year).
_meta.next_update_target: When MOFCOM 中國台灣 (2026年版) is published, refresh with 2025 annual figure and updated cumulative.
